name: SelectQuote, Inc.
summary: PART I Overview SelectQuote, Inc. (together with its subsidiaries, SelectQuote, the Company, we, us) is a leading technology-enabled, direct-to-consumer (DTC) distribution and engagement platform for selling insurance policies and healthcare services. In recent years, we have increasingly focused on expanding our healthcare services platform as a natural extension of our core Senior distribution insurance business.
